risk_factors: Model confidence is modest (23/100) — wide outcome spread.

reasons: Current form favours Argentina — group record 6W-0D-0L (+22 Elo) vs England 5W-1D-0L (+33).
explainability.why_penalties: Both sides are closely matched, so 21% of simulations finish level after 120'.
explainability.what_could_change: An early goal swings momentum; an injury to Argentina's key creator, or England stealing a set-piece, flips it.
